title: Homer to Tolstoy
description: Volume I literary spine for the two-volume public ph-civ artifact, exposed through cross-volume routing.
guardrail: This is a guided literary orientation path, not a claim that literature alone drives history.
first_reader_gap: The route is structurally correct, but a first public reader still needs a launch packet that explains why this spine matters before audience growth is pursued.

sequence.author: Tolstoy
sequence.note: Routed endpoint via an Anna Karenina coda, not a dedicated Tolstoy lecture.
